infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: City Wallet uses your location to find nearby offers. Your raw coordinates are never stored.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: City Wallet tracks your location in the background so offers appear automatically as you walk past shops. Coordinates are never stored.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: City Wallet tracks your location in the background so offers appear automatically as you walk past shops.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: City Wallet needs the camera to scan offer QR codes.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: City Wallet uses your location to find nearby offers. Your raw coordinates are never stored.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: City Wallet tracks your location in the background so offers appear automatically as you walk near shops.

plugins.cameraPermission: City Wallet needs camera access to scan QR codes at checkout.
